creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Netscape Navigator 4.73 for BSD/OS, similar to the netscape47-navigator
and linux-netscape47-navigator ports but not needing a.out libraries or
Linux compatibility

This port uses files from the www/bsdi-netscape47-communicator port which
I just submitted.  Please see ports/18595 in GNATS.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
